message: refactor: clean up lint and tests

files.patch:
@@ -17,8 +17,8 @@ excluded:
 
 # Rules to disable
 disabled_rules:
-  - redundant_self # Keep self. for Swift 6 concurrency clarity
   - todo # Allow TODO comments in development
+  - trailing_comma # Enforced by SwiftFormat
   - type_body_length # Allow longer types for comprehensive implementations
   - file_length # Allow longer files for complete implementations
 
@@ -98,15 +98,6 @@ function_parameter_count:
   warning: 6
   error: 8
 
-type_body_length:
-  warning: 300
-  error: 500
-
-file_length:
-  warning: 500
-  error: 1000
-  ignore_comment_only_lines: true
-
 cyclomatic_complexity:
   warning: 10
   error: 20
@@ -159,13 +150,6 @@ custom_rules:
     message: "Use #expect instead of XCTAssert in swift-testing"
     severity: warning
 
-  # Ensure proper documentation for public APIs
-  public_documentation:
-    name: "Public Documentation"
-    regex: 'public\s+(class|struct|enum|protocol|func|var|let)(?![^{]*\/\/\/)'
-    message: "Public APIs should have documentation comments"
-    severity: warning
-
 # File header template
 file_header:
   required_pattern: |
@@ -177,4 +161,4 @@ file_header:
                     \/\/
 
 # Reporter type
-reporter: "xcode"
\ No newline at end of file
+reporter: "xcode"

+

API Documentation

+

This is the main documentation for our REST API.

+

Authentication

+

All requests must include an API key in the header:

+ 
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
+

Endpoints

+

GET /users

+

Retrieves a list of users. Supports the following parameters:

+
    +
  • limit - Maximum number of results (default: 20)
    • +
  • offset - Number of results to skip (default: 0)
    • +
  • filter - Filter criteria in JSON format
    • +
+

Example Response

+ 
{
+          "users": [
+            {
+              "id": 1,
+              "name": "John Doe",
+              "email": "john@example.com"
+            }
+          ],
+          "total": 150,
+          "page": 1
+        }
+
+

Note: This endpoint requires read permissions.

+
+
+

POST /users

+

Creates a new user. Required fields:

+
    +
  1. name - User's full name
    2. +
  2. email - Valid email address
    3. +
  3. password - Minimum 8 characters
    4. +
+
